'''thahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wordlessly|wordlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wordlessly|wordlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thahate|thahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thahatesher|thahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thahatesherĂ«m|thahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thahatero|thahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thahateshĂ«|thahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thahateshĂ«m|thahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithahatero|gokithahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithahateshĂ«|gokithahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithahateshĂ«m|gokithahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothahankerom|gothahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothahankeshĂ«|gothahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothahankeshĂ«m|gothahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothahankeya|gothahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thahaterom|thahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thahatemu|thahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thahateya|thahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithahaterom|gokithahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithahatemu|gokithahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithahateya|gokithahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thahahate|thahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thahahatesher|thahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thahahatesherĂ«m|thahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thahahatero|thahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thahahateshĂ«|thahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thahahateshĂ«m|thahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithahahatero|gokithahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithahahateshĂ«|gokithahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithahahateshĂ«m|gokithahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothahahankerom|gothahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothahahankeshĂ«|gothahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothahahankeshĂ«m|gothahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothahahankeya|gothahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thahahaterom|thahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thahahatemu|thahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thahahateya|thahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithahahaterom|gokithahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithahahatemu|gokithahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithahahateya|gokithahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠte|thĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠtesher|thĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠtero|thĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠhĂŠtero|gokithĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠterom|thĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠtemu|thĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠhĂŠteya|thĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠhĂŠterom|gokithĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠhĂŠteya|gokithĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafhafte|thafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafhaftesher|thafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafhaftesherĂ«m|thafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafhaftero|thafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafhafteshĂ«|thafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafhafteshĂ«m|thafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafhaftero|gokithafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafhafteshĂ«|gokithafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafhafteshĂ«m|gokithafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafhafnkerom|gothafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafhafnkeshĂ«|gothafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafhafnkeshĂ«m|gothafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafhafnkeya|gothafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafhafterom|thafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafhaftemu|thafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafhafteya|thafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafhafterom|gokithafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafhaftemu|gokithafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafhafteya|gokithafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
